title: The Salaries and Allowances of Officers of Parliament Act, 1953
full_text: The Salaries and Allowances of Officers of Parliament Act, 1953 संसद् अधिकारी वेतन और भत्ता अधिनियम, 1953 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1953-20 Act Number: 20 Enactment Date: 1953-05-16 Act Year: 1953 Short Title: The Salaries and Allowances of Officers of Parliament Act, 1953 Hindi Title: संसद् अधिकारी वेतन और भत्ता अधिनियम, 1953 Long Title: An Act to provide for the salaries and allowances of certain officers of Parliament. Ministry: Ministry of Parliamentary Affairs Enforcement Date: 01-05-1953 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Salaries and Allowances of Officers of Parliament Act, 1953 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definition. Section 3. Salaries, etc., of officers of Parliament. Section 4. Residence for officers of Parliament. Section 5. Sumptuary allowance. Section 6. Travelling and daily allowances to officers of Parliament. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Medical facilities to officers of Parliament. Show Related Subordinates Section 7A. Family pension, etc., to spouse of Speaker dying in office. Section 8. Advances to officers of Parliament for purchase of motor-cars. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Officers of Parliament not to draw salary or allowances as Members of Parliament. Section 10. Notification respecting appointment, etc., of officers of Parliament to be conclusive evidence thereof. Section 10A. Exemption from liability to pay income-tax on daily allowance received by the Chairman and certain perquisites received by an officer of Parliament. Section 11. Power to make rules.
